{{Quote|As I recall, the ''Guardian'' took quite a pounding at Tantive V before it finally escaped.|[[Cryle Cavv]]|<ref name="TfO">{{JournalCite|15|Two for One}}</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Tantive V''' was a battle between forces of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and a Imperial force commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]].<ref name="WbC" />

During the battle, two of Drommel's three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] were destroyed, while one, the ''[[Wolf's Claw]]'', was captured. Drommel's flagship, the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']], took heavy damage, but managed to retreat to [[Soullex]]. Admiral Drommel himself survived the battle.<ref name="WbC" /> ''Guardian'' was later captured over Soullex by the New Republic and added to their [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|naval forces]].<ref name="TfO" />
